CIVIL COVER SHEET RECEIVED
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-03-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

NO APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 4/1/2003 TO FRANKLIN DEAN THOMAS, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: IRENE BURNS. (212)
